subject: refactor(mobile): move platform selection from Export tab to Presets tab
body:
Platform selection defines canvas dimensions — a foundational design decision
that should happen before layout/theme/content, not at export time. On mobile,
the platform selector was buried in the Export tab's bottom sheet. Now it
appears as the first collapsible section in the Presets tab, creating a natural
workflow: platform → layout → theme → look.

Desktop is unchanged (platform selector already lives above the canvas).
Export tab on mobile now contains only download controls.

Changes:
- TemplatesTab: Added PlatformPreview as first section (conditional on mobile)
- App.jsx: Pass onPlatformChange to TemplatesTab on mobile, remove
  PlatformPreview from export section in BottomSheet
- TutorialModal: Updated Presets step to mention Platform, updated Export
  step to remove "Pick a size" and reference Presets tab instead
- CLAUDE.md: Updated tab descriptions and mobile layout docs

Tags: ui, mobile, ux, presets, export
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
